name: Sophia - Med Spa AI Front Desk

model.systemMessage: [PASTE FULL SYSTEM PROMPT FROM medspa-system-prompt.md HERE]

voice.voiceId: [USE CARTESIA HANNAH OR EQUIVALENT WARM FEMALE VOICE ID]

firstMessage: Thank you for calling Radiance Medical Spa. This is Sophia, how can I help you today?
endCallMessage: Thank you for calling Radiance Medical Spa. We look forward to seeing you. Have a wonderful day!

CONFIGURATION_TIPS: Temperature 0.4 keeps responses consistent but not robotic
maxTokens 250 prevents long-winded responses — critical for voice
silenceTimeoutSeconds 30 gives caller time to think without hanging up too fast
maxDurationSeconds 600 = 10 min cap, prevents runaway calls during demo
For production: add serverUrl for webhook to capture call data + trigger SMS
TOOL_INTEGRATION: Add Cal.com or Calendly function tool for real booking
Add Twilio SMS function for confirmation texts
Add webhook to push lead data to Google Sheets or CRM
